Aligns the portfolio mark, the official portfolio snapshot and the current-alpha Top 25 / Top 50 / SPY marks to one completed US market date. One explicit, manual run. No orders, no automation, no broker.

          HISTORICAL PAPER BOOKS — MARKET CONTEXT & LEGACY PANELS (READ-ONLY ARCHIVE)

        
Historical Paper Books: the legacy paper portfolio (existing positions, fills, snapshots and P&L) is preserved here read-only. It is never the operational portfolio — the single operational book is Alpha Paper Book #1 above.

The session itself is started from the single Daily Review control in the Daily Workflow view.

Review actions only. No signals, decisions, orders, trades, fills, or broker actions are created. Approving a trade idea does not place a trade. Approving does not place a trade. It only prepares a paper trade ticket.

Scan Selection Funnel

              MANUAL REVIEW
              PAPER ORDERS ONLY
              NO BROKER EXECUTION
              AUTOMATION OFF
            

            
          

          
          

          
Read-only selection diagnostics — paper trade only, no broker execution, automation off. Full S&P 500 local screen runs first, then Prediction dispatch is limited to the top-ranked names. Universe / price-history / screened figures are computed live now; session-scoped counts belong to the labeled session.

          
Connect and run Daily Review to populate the scan selection funnel.

            Quant Model Methodology
            MANUAL REVIEW
            NO BROKER EXECUTION
            AUTOMATION OFF
          
          
Read-only model contract — paper trade only, no broker execution. Honest view of what exists today vs what a quant-grade model needs. No feature is shown as active unless real point-in-time data backs it.

          
Connect to load the model methodology contract.


          
          
Current Layer 1: Local S&P 500 Pre-Screen

          

          

          

          
Current limitations


          
          
Current Layer 2: Remote GCP Prediction

          

          

          

          
Current limitations


          
          
Actionability Gate

          

          

          


          
          
Target Quant Architecture

          

          
A future quant-grade model must use point-in-time data and walk-forward validation. No feature is added unless it is sourced, timestamped, testable, and backtestable.


          
          
Data Readiness

          
Missing feature families carry a strict rule: Do not fake this feature. They stay off until a real, sourced, timestamped data feed exists.

          


          
          
Implementation Roadmap

            Advanced / Audit
            Audit trail — internal signal/decision/order details
          
          

            
You do not need these sections for normal daily review. Internal signals, decisions, and order details are audit-only. Internal pipeline details for audit and troubleshooting. Use Today's Review above for the primary workflow. No automatic trading actions.

              Plan Analytics (Market Snapshot, Candidates, Trade Recs, Rotation, Risk)
            
            

              
Market Snapshot

              
Run Daily Process to populate market snapshot. Benchmark (SPY) and key metrics will appear here after scan.

            

            
            

              

                
Candidate Funnel

                PREVIEW ONLY
              

              
Run Daily Process to see candidate counts: Scanned → Eligible → Approved → Planned.

            

            
            

              

                
Trade Recommendations

                PREVIEW ONLY
              

              
Primary Recommendation

              
Generate Daily Plan to see trade recommendations. BUY candidates and their expected returns will appear here.

            

            
            

              

                
Rotation Recommendations

                PREVIEW ONLY
              

              

                When portfolio is at max capacity, rotation compares incoming candidates vs existing positions by expected after-cost P&L improvement. Full capacity does not mean rejected — it means rotation analysis is needed. Future: automatic comparison logic.
              

              

                
                
Rotation unavailable — portfolio not at max capacity, or preview not yet run.

              

              

                

              

            

            
            

              
Risk Blocks

              
Blocked Summary

              
Generate Daily Plan to see blocked candidates and risk rule reasons (e.g. MAX_POSITIONS_REACHED, MIN_CONFIDENCE).

            

            

          

        


        
        

          
            Setup / rerun daily process
             (scan, generate candidates, daily plan)
          
          

          
Advanced rerun controls. Usually not needed after Today's Review is loaded.


        
        

          

            
Daily Process Preview

            PREVIEW ONLY
            No writes
            
            
          

          

            
0: Refresh

            
1: Prediction

            
2: Candidate Preview

            
3: Daily Plan

            
4: Signal Preview

            
5: Decision Preview

            
6: Order Preview

          

          

            Prediction Service: ---
            
          

          
Preview only. No candidates saved. No signals created. No decisions created. No paper orders created. No fills. No broker orders. Automation off.

          

        


        
        


          
          


            
            

              

                
SCAN — Generate Candidate Preview

                
Creates nothing. Safe to run multiple times.

              

              
            


            
            

              

                
SCAN — Save Candidates

                
No signals, decisions, or orders created.

                
Existing holdings are excluded from new-entry orders. Use Position Review for open holdings.

                

                

                  
                  
                

              

            


            
            

              

                
REVIEW — Review Queue

                

                
Review candidates in the Review Queue card in the center column. Use Approve, Watch, or Reject buttons for each candidate.

              

            


            
            

              
PLAN — Generate Daily Plan

EXECUTE PREVIEW — Signals & Decisions

                
Orders are disabled. No trades will be executed.

                
Advanced signal/decision actions are available in the Paper Orders panel (right) and Audit / Advanced tab.

              

            


            
            

              Calibrated Rotation Workbench (Advanced)
              

                

                  

                    
Calibrated Rotation Workbench

Calibration Preset:

                      

                        
                        
                        
                      

                      

                    

                    

                      
                      
                    

                    
                  

                

                

                  

                    
Calibrated Rotation Workbench

                    
Preview only. No signals, decisions, or orders are created.

                    

                  

                

              

            


            
            

              Signal & Decision Glossary
              

                
BUY — Candidate for long position. Requires approval, signal, decision. No orders automatically.

                
HOLD / WATCH — Not recommended for new long entry. Tracked only.

                
REJECTED — Risk rules blocked. Most common: MAX_POSITIONS_REACHED.

                
Decision = app recommendation | Rec = model rec | Conf = confidence | Return % = expected 5-day | RS SPY = relative strength vs SPY 20d

              

            


            
            
Fetch Prices Result

            
Market Scan Result

            
Prediction Strategy Result

            
Strategy Readiness

            Paper workflow complete. Run Daily Process Preview to start a new cycle.
          


          
          

            Decision = app recommendation  |  Rec = model recommendation  |  Conf = model confidence  |  Return % = expected 5-day  |  RS SPY = relative strength vs SPY 20d
          


          

            
            
            
          

          

          

            

              
                

                  TickerStatusDecisionScoreRecConfReturn %RS SPYActions
                

              
              
                
Connect to load

              
            

          


          
          

            Watch = keep tracking, no signal  |  Reject = exclude from signal creation  |  Approve = eligible for signal creation (does not create orders)
          

        


      


      
      


        
        

          
Execution Safety Summary

          

            MANUAL REVIEW
            PAPER ORDERS ONLY
            AUTOMATION OFF
            NO BROKER EXECUTION
          

          
Pipeline: Preview Signals → Create Signals → Preview Decisions → Create Decisions → Preview Orders → Create Paper Orders → Fill Pending Paper Orders. No broker execution. No automation. Paper fills only.

        


        
        

          
Decision Outcome Summary

          

          

        


        
        


          
          

            

              

                
Step A

                
Preview Signals

              

              
            

            
Preview only. Does not write Signal rows. Reads APPROVED_FOR_SIGNAL candidates from Review Queue.

            
            
No signal preview yet. Approve candidates in Review Queue first, then click Preview Signals.

          


          
          

            

              

                
Step B

                
Create Signals

              

              
            

            
Creates Signal rows only. Does not create TradeDecisions or Orders. Requires APPROVED_FOR_SIGNAL candidates in Review Queue.

            
            
Ready to create signals from candidates

          


        


        
        


          
          

            

              

                
Step C

                
Preview Trade Decisions

              

              
            

            
Preview only. Does not write TradeDecision rows. Shows which signals pass risk rules and at what qty/notional. REJECTED = risk rule blocked (e.g. MAX_POSITIONS_REACHED).

            
            
            
No decision preview yet. Create signals first, then click Preview Decisions.

          


          
          

            

              

                
Step D

                
Create Trade Decisions

              

              
            

            
Creates TradeDecision rows only. Does not create Orders. Requires signals. Safety: no orders created, no automation, no broker submission.

            
            
            
Ready to create trade decisions

          


        


        
        

          
            ▸
            Step E — Preview Orders
            PAPER ORDERS ONLY
            PREVIEW ONLY
          
          

            

              
Preview only. No orders created here. Use Step F (Create Paper Orders) to create paper order tickets.

              
            

            
            
            
No order preview yet. Create decisions first, then click Preview Orders.

          

        


        
        

          
            ▸
            Step F — Create Paper Order Tickets
            CREATES ORDER TICKETS ONLY
            NO BROKER EXECUTION
            NO FILLS
          
          

            

              
Creates paper Order rows with status=PENDING. PAPER ORDERS ONLY. No broker execution. No fills. No position changes. Automation off. Manual review required.

              
            

            
Ready. Complete Step E (Preview Orders) first to confirm eligibility, then click Create Paper Orders.

          

        


        
        

          
            ▸
            Step G — Fill Pending Paper Orders
            PAPER FILLS ONLY
            NO BROKER EXECUTION
            NO LIVE TRADES
          
          

            

              
Fills PENDING paper Order rows in the local DB only. PAPER FILLS ONLY. No broker. No live trades. Updates paper portfolio positions and cash. Automation off. Manual review required.

              
            

            
Ready. Complete Step F (Create Paper Orders) first, then click Fill Pending Paper Orders to simulate fills in the paper portfolio.

          

        


        
        

          
            ▸
            Step H — Cancel Pending Paper Orders
            PAPER CANCEL ONLY
            NO BROKER EXECUTION
            NO LIVE TRADES
          
          

            

              
Cancels PENDING paper Order rows in the local DB only. PAPER CANCEL ONLY. No broker. No live trades. Does not change cash or positions. Automation off. Manual review required.

              
            

            
Ready. Click Cancel Pending Paper Orders to cancel all PENDING paper order tickets. Cash and positions are not changed.

            Portfolio Analytics
            PREVIEW ONLY
            NO ORDERS

            Read-only portfolio-level decision view. No DB writes. Allocation, exposure, P&L and risk are derived from current holdings and the same monitor rules as Position Review. Click a ticker for full detail.

            Position Review
            PREVIEW ONLY
            NO SIGNALS
            NO DECISIONS
            NO ORDERS
            NO TRADES
            NO FILLS
            NO POSITION CHANGES
            NO BROKER EXECUTION
            MANUAL REVIEW
          

          

            One-click preview only - no signals, no decisions, no orders, no trades, no fills, no position changes.
            V1 rules: REVIEW_FOR_EXIT/SELL/PREVIEW_ONLY if P&L ≤ -5%, WATCH if P&L ≤ -2% or weight > 25%, HOLD otherwise.
          

          

            
            
          

          

            

            

              

                
                  

                    TickerQtyAvg CostLatest Price
                    Market ValueUnrlzd P&LP&L %Weight %
                    RecExit ActionDecisionOrder
                    SideQty
                    Est. Exit ValueEst. Realized P&L
                    ReasonNotes
                  

                
                
              

            

          


          
          

            Advanced preview layers (Position Monitor / Exit Signal Preview / Exit Decision Preview)
            


              
              

                

                  Position Monitor
                  PREVIEW ONLY
                  NO ORDERS
                  NO FILLS
                  NO BROKER EXECUTION
                  MANUAL REVIEW
                

                

                  Preview only - no signals, no decisions, no orders, no fills.
                  V1 rules: REVIEW_FOR_EXIT if P&L ≤ -5%, WATCH if P&L ≤ -2% or weight > 25%, HOLD otherwise.

                  NO ORDERS

                  Preview only - no exit signals, no decisions, no orders, no fills.
                  V1 rules: PREVIEW_EXIT (SELL full qty) if Position Monitor = REVIEW_FOR_EXIT, WATCH if WATCH, HOLD otherwise.

                  Preview only - no decisions, no orders, no fills.
                  V1 rules: SELL (full qty) if Exit Signal = PREVIEW_EXIT, WATCH if WATCH, HOLD otherwise. No TradeDecision rows are created.

Loading the operational target review…

          
—

          

          

            

              
DATE READINESS

              
—

              
Fundamental data follows its OWN quarterly cadence — it is allowed to be older than the market date and never has to equal it.

            

            

              
TARGET SUMMARY

              
—

            

            

              
APPROVAL CHECKLIST

              
—

            

          

          
COMPLETE TARGET PORTFOLIO —

          
—

          
FINAL ACTIONS MANUAL ONLY

          

            
            
            
          

          

          
          

            
—

            
—

            
Confirmation phrase: —

            

              
              
            

          

          

          
The backend snapshot-confirm endpoint enforces the freshness gate itself (never only these buttons): a target whose alpha market date is behind the latest completed market date is rejected with the exact blocker ALPHA_MARKET_DATE_BEHIND_LATEST_COMPLETED_MARKET_DATE.

        


        
        

          

            ALPHA BOOK IMPLEMENTATION PLAN
              —
            
          

          

            PAPER ONLY
            NO LIVE ORDERS
            NO BROKER
            AUTOMATION OFF
            MANUAL CONFIRMATION
          

          
—

          
          

            

              
LEGACY PAPER PORTFOLIO SEPARATE

              
—

              
Not part of Alpha Paper Book #1. Never migrated, never modified by the alpha-book workflow.

              
LEGACY SIGNAL PORTFOLIO CAPACITY: —

            

            

              
ALPHA PAPER BOOK #1 NOT INITIALIZED YET

              
INITIAL ALPHA TARGET: — NAMES · Dedicated $100,000 virtual capital

              
These 25 names are the complete validated target portfolio, not optional ideas to select manually.

              
ALPHA BOOK TARGET: 25  ·  TEMPORARY REBALANCE LIMIT: 30

            

          

          

            Target book fundamental_momentum_50_50_top25
            Capital $100,000
            Target names —
            Executable —
            Blocked —
            Invested % —
            Residual cash % —
            Est. cost —
            Max sector —
            Largest position —
            Capacity 25 / 30
          

          

            
            
            
            
            
          

          
          

            
—

            
—

            
Confirmation phrase: —

            

              
              
            

          

          

          

          
Deterministic integer-share sizing at the latest completed owned closes; residual cash stays cash; a blocked target’s allocation is held as cash (never replaced by an unvalidated name); the plan never exceeds capital after estimated costs. Execution is the desk’s NEXT_CLOSE model — no hindsight, fills never rewritten, everything paper-only and append-only.

        


        
        

          

            PAPER TRADING DESK
              NO PAPER BOOK YET
              —
            
          

          

            PAPER ORDERS ONLY
            NO LIVE ORDERS
            NO BROKER
            AUTOMATION OFF
            MANUAL CONFIRMATION
          

          
—

          

            NAV —
            Cash —
            Holdings —
            Desk mark —
            Open orders —
            Paper fills —
            Exec model —
            Cost/side —
          

          

            
            
            
            
            
          

          
          

            
—

            
—

            
Confirmation phrase: —

            

              
              
            

          

          

          

          

          
—

          
Execution model NEXT_CLOSE — a paper order approved on date A fills at the first completed owned EOD close on/after A that was not yet in the desk store at approval time (no hindsight; paper fills are never rewritten; every desk ledger is local and append-only with a verifiable hash chain). Nothing here creates a live order, contacts a broker, or runs on a schedule.

          

            Desk Audit — raw status payload and ledger integrity
            
—

          

        


        
        

          Advanced — decision detail, health & diagnostics
          

        
        

          

            
            

              

                Action Summary NO PLAIN BUY/SELL
                —
              

              
—

              

              
—

              
Candidates only — nothing here places an order or changes a position. Use “Why” on any row for the evidence-based explanation. The fast sleeve is inactive and contributes no recommendation.

            

            
            

              
Proposed Portfolio Changes —

              

              
—

              
—

            

            
            

              
Since Last Review

              
—

            

            
            

              Model Evidence — roles, books and sleeve detail
              

                composite_sn — research champion (never replaced) ·
                mom_6_1 — paper challenger ·
                fundamental_momentum_50_50_v1 — operational primary paper ensemble (fixed 50/50, never weight-optimized).
                The full sleeve tables, model books, score legs and blocked-model notices live on the
                Alpha Portfolio page.
              

            

            

              Historical Performance — paper reconstruction (25 bps, PIT)
              

                The six-book historical paper reconstruction (net cumulative, Sharpe, drawdown, turnover, combined-model lift)
                is on the Alpha Portfolio page under Performance.
                No expected-return forecast is produced anywhere.
              

            

            

              Methodology — how this decision is assembled
              

                The decision headline, action buckets, agreement classes and health statuses are deterministic rules over
                stored fields (documented in api/portfolio_manager.py) — no language model, no invented
                expected returns, no manufactured confidence scores. Signals come from the validated Phase 25 platform
                (frozen fundamental panel + owned survivorship-free momentum panel); the executed-portfolio mark is the
                canonical Phase 14-C valuation. Data-readiness detail lives under
                Research & Audit.
              

            

            

              Audit / Reproducibility — raw decision payload
              
—

            

          


          
          

            

              
Manual Review Flow MANUAL ONLY

              
    
                
  1. Refresh desk market data (manual, below).
    2. 
                
  2. Review the proposed portfolio and health.
    3. 
                
  3. Preview the paper-alpha snapshot (read-only).
    4. 
                
  4. Confirm the snapshot manually (ledger-only write).
    5. 
                
  5. Create, preview and confirm paper orders (desk below).
    6. 
                
  6. Monitor paper fills, NAV and attribution.
    7. 
              

              
              
—

              
              

                
Confirm paper-alpha snapshot?

                
Writes ONE immutable snapshot to the dedicated paper-alpha ledger only. It creates no signals, no trade decisions, no orders, no fills, no trades and changes no positions.

                
Confirmation phrase: CONFIRM_MHZ_PAPER_SNAPSHOT

                

                  
                  
                

              

              

              
Confirming records a PAPER ALPHA SNAPSHOT — it never executes a portfolio.

            

            

              

                Portfolio Health
                —
              

              
—

              
Every non-healthy status carries its explanation. No single opaque confidence score exists.

            

            

              
Safety & State

              
—

              

                NO ORDERS
                NO BROKER
                NO FILLS
                NO SIGNALS
                NO TRADE DECISIONS
                NO POSITION CHANGES
              

              
This page reads existing paper data and writes nothing by itself. Every manual write is explicit and token-gated: the paper-alpha snapshot confirmation above and the paper-desk actions below (all local append-only ledgers; never the trading database).

Model Sleeves CADENCE-AWARE

              
—

            

            
            

              

                Primary Recommendations 50/50 TOP-25
                —
              

              
Recommendations are BUY_CANDIDATE / HOLD / REDUCE_CANDIDATE / EXIT_CANDIDATE / WAIT only — never a plain order. No order is created; nothing is sent to a broker.

              
—

            

            
            

              
Book Comparison 6 BOOKS

              
—

            

            
            

              
Performance PAPER RECONSTRUCTION

              

                composite_sn — research champion (never replaced) ·
                mom_6_1 — paper challenger ·
                fundamental_momentum_50_50_v1 — operational primary paper ensemble.
                The ensemble did not replace the research champion.

—

            

            
            

              
Fast Sleeve INACTIVE

              
—

—

            

            
            

              Audit / Advanced — validations, fingerprints, reconciliation, blocked models
              
—

            

          


          
          

            

              
Safety & Operating State

              
—

              
—

              
Next manual review

              
—

            

            

              
Manual Snapshot PREVIEW → CONFIRM

              
Preview is read-only. Confirm appends ONE immutable paper snapshot to the dedicated local ledger only — never an order, fill, trade decision, live signal or database write.

              
              
—

              
              

                
Confirm paper snapshot?

                
This appends one immutable, paper-only snapshot to the local ledger. It is idempotent (a duplicate for the same market date + identical primary book is skipped). No order is created.

                

                  
                  
                

              

              
—

            

            

              
Sensitivity Views FIXED 50/50 PRIMARY

              
The primary combined model uses FIXED 50/50 weights. 30/70 and 70/30 fundamental/momentum views are diagnostics only and never silently replace the primary.

                Run Alpha Factory Build MANUAL
                
            
                
              Regenerates the registry / leaderboard / correlation / diagnostics / candidate-report artifacts from the owned frozen panel.
              Preview computes and writes nothing. A confirmed build writes ONLY the dedicated local research-artifact store — never the database, never orders, never the champion.
            
                
            
                
              LOAD
              GENERATE
              EVALUATE
              GATE
              RANK
              WRITE

                Run Price-Alpha Build MANUAL
                
            
                
              Regenerates the Phase 21 artifact package (trailing-price manifest, registry, leaderboard, correlation, horizon summary, rejection report, family summary, combination report, diagnostics, final report) from the owned price + fundamental panels.
              Preview computes and writes nothing. A confirmed build writes ONLY the dedicated local research-artifact store — never the database, never orders, never the champion.
            
                
            
                
              LOAD
              PANEL
              GENERATE
              EVALUATE
              GATE
              COMBINE
              WRITE
            
                
            
                
              
              
            
                
            
                —
                
            
                —

            PAPER BOOK DECISION GATE
            provisional operating decision — champion composite_sn — paper test only
          
                            

          
          
                            
            PROVISIONAL PAPER BOOK ONLY
            NOT LIVE-TRADING APPROVAL
            NO ORDERS
            NO BROKER
            NO AUTOMATION
            MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED
          
                            

          
                            
            
            Reads the read-only Phase 13-I reconstruction and states which book is the provisional primary, whether any risk threshold is breached, and where the quarterly review stands. No orders. No rebalancing.
          
                            

          
          
                            
            Provisional paper-book comparison for manual review only. NOT live-trading approval. No orders. No broker. No automation. Does not rerank or rebalance the champion. Promotes no book to live trading.

          Workflow Details
          
                                
            
                                
              Step 1: Ingest Price
              Not Started
            
                                
            
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                
              Step 2: Run Strategy
              Not Started
            
                                
            
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                
              Step 3: Manual Signal / Override
              Not Started
            
                                
            
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                
              Step 4: Run Fill
              Not Started
            
                                
            
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                
              Step 5: Run Snapshot
              Not Started

              Not Started

            Ingest Prices
            
                                
              
                                
                
                                
                
                                
              
                                
              
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            Ingest Benchmark Prices
            
                                
              
                                
                
                                
                
                                
              
                                
              
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            Submit Signal
            
                                
              
                                
                
                                
                
                                
                
                                
                  
                  
                
                                
                
                                
                
                                
                
                                
              
                                
              
              Weekday only. Server derives market_date from US/Eastern clock.
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            Trigger Fill
            
                                
              
                                
                
                                
                
                                
              
                                
              
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            Trigger Snapshot
            
                                
              
                                
                
                                
                
                                
              
                                
              
              Requires prices for all open positions.
            
                                
          
                                
        
                                

        
        
                                
          
                                Universe Status
                                
          
                                
            The app does not automatically fetch S&P500 constituents. To use a full universe, provide data/sp500_universe_full.csv.
          
                                
          
                                Click Refresh to load universe status.
                                
          
        
                                

        
        
                                
          
                                Universe Price Coverage
                                
          
                                Click Refresh to load coverage.
                                
          
          
                                
            Price Backfill Controls
            
                                
              Backfill writes market data only. It does not create signals, decisions, orders, or automation.
            
                                
            
                                
              
                                
                
                
              
                                
              
                                
                
                
              
                                
              
                                
                
                
              
                                
              
                                
                
                
              
                                
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              Universe: writes price_snapshots only. Run One Batch processes up to Max Tickers starting at Start Index.
                                
              Run All Batches loops sequentially (dry run recommended first). Benchmark: writes benchmark_prices only.
            
                                
          
                                
        
                                

        
        
                                
          
                                Scoring Profile Calibration Preview
                                
          
                                
            Calibration is read-only. It uses existing historical prices only. No signals, decisions, or orders are created.
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                Multi-date Presets (overrides As-of Date for recommendation):
                                
            
                                
              
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
                                Dates to evaluate:
                                
              
                                
            
                                
          
                                
          
          
                                
        
                                

        
        
                                
          
                                Daily Plan Replay / Backtest Preview
                                
          
                                
            PREVIEW ONLY — NO SIGNALS — NO DECISIONS — NO ORDERS. Uses existing historical price data only. No GCP calls.
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            Presets:
            
            
            
            
          
                                
          
          
                                
        
                                

        
        
                                
          
                                Replay Profile Comparison
                                
          
                                
            PREVIEW ONLY — NO SIGNALS — NO DECISIONS — NO ORDERS — NO GCP. Compares all scoring profiles on the same historical dates to determine which is most reliable.
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
            
                                
              
              
            
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            Presets:
            
            
            
            
          
                                
          
          
                                
        
                                

        
        
                                
          
                                Manual review journal
                                
          
                                
            Review rationale — latest candidate review actions with reason code and optional note.
            MANUAL REVIEW
            No trading actions are created by review notes.
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                
              
                
                                
                  Ticker
                  Status
                  Reason code
                  Note
                  Reviewed at
                
                                
                                              
              
                
                                Load review queue to populate journal.
                                
                                              
            
                                
          
                                
        
                                

        
        
                                
          
                                
            
                                Prediction Run Capture
                                
            READ ONLY
            NO ORDERS
            NO TRADES
            NO BROKER EXECUTION
            AUTOMATION OFF
          
                                
          
                                
            Local evidence store: every prediction Paper Trader fetches from the remote GCP service is recorded here
            (request payload, raw response, normalized fields, latency, errors). Capturing a run never creates a signal,
            decision, order, trade, or broker action. Newest first.
          
                                
          
                                
            
            
            
            
            
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                
              
                
                                
                  Time
                  Ticker
                  Session
                  Source
                  Recommendation
                  Confidence
                  Exp. return
                  Forecast 5d
                  Latency
                  Status
                  Raw
                
                                
                                              
              
                
                                Connect and click Refresh to load captured prediction runs.

                                Bootstrap-
                                
            
                                Main started-
                                
            
                                Main completed-
                                
            
                                Post-auth-
                                
            
                                Run action-
                                
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                Last Error
                                
            
          
                                
          
                                
            
                                Last Rejection
                                
            
          
                                
        
                                

      
                                

    
                                

  
                                

  
  
                                
    
                                
      
                                Action / Safety Panel
                                
      
                                
        MANUAL REVIEW
        PAPER ORDERS ONLY
        AUTOMATION OFF
        NO BROKER EXECUTION
      
                                
    
                                
    
                                
      
                                Workflow
                                
      
                                Current task
                                
      
                                ---
                                
      
                                Next action
                                
      
                                Connect and load data to begin.
                                
      
                                Go to Daily Plan → Candidates to Review.

        Status
        -
      
                                
      
                                
        NAV
        -
      
                                
      
                                
        Alpha book target
        25
      
                                
      
                                
        Temporary rebalance limit
        30

        Open positions
        -

        5

        -

        Backend
        -
      
                                
      
                                
        App Session
        Not Connected
      
                                
    
                                

    
                                
      
                                Last Connect Check
                                
      
                                Not attempted
                                
      
                                Auth endpoint: /v1/auth/check
                                
    
                                

    
                                
      
                                Last UI Action
                                
      
                                Not attempted
                                
      
    
                                

    
                                
      
                                Safety Mode
                                
      
                                Manual review
                                
      
                                No broker execution
                                
      
                                Automation off
                                
      
                                No orders unless explicitly created
                                
    
                                

    
                                
      
                                Paper position open
                                
      
                                No pending paper orders
                                
      
                                Monitor Portfolio / Performance History
                                
      
                                Run a new Daily Process Preview when ready
                                
    
                                

    
                                
      ▶ Advanced order controls (legacy paper workflow)
      
                                Usually not needed. Paper order controls remain manual and create no broker execution. Legacy workflow only (archived book) — they never touch Alpha Paper Book #1.
                                
      
                                
        
                                Create Orders
                                
        
                                PAPER ORDERS ONLY
                                
        
                                Creates PENDING order tickets. No broker. No fills. Automation off.
                                
        
                                
        
      
                                
      
                                
        
                                Fill Orders
                                
        
                                PAPER FILLS ONLY — NO LIVE TRADES
                                
        
                                Fills PENDING paper orders in local DB only. No broker. No automation. Updates paper portfolio.
                                
        
      
                                
      
                                
        
                                Cancel Orders
                                
        
                                PAPER CANCEL ONLY — NO LIVE TRADES
                                
        
                                Cancels PENDING paper orders in local DB only. No broker. No cash changes. No position changes. Automation off.
                                
        
                                
        
      
                                
    
                                

    
                                
      
                                
        Manual Review  |  No Orders  |  Automation Off
      
                                
    
                                
  
                                


                                


                                




                                
  
                                
    
                                Start Daily Review Session
                                
    
                                
      
                                This will refresh market/portfolio data and prepare new-entry candidates. It will not create signals, decisions, orders, trades, fills, or broker actions.
                                
    
                                
    
                                
      
                                Steps that will run:
                                
      
                                  
        
                                1. Refresh market prices & portfolio snapshot
                                  2. 
        
                                2. Run prediction scan (Daily Process Preview)
                                  3. 
        
                                3. Save eligible new-entry candidates to Review Queue
                                  4. 
        
                                4. Generate Daily Review Summary
                                  5. 
      
                                
    
                                
    
                                
      MANUAL SESSION
      DB WRITES: MARKET + REVIEW ONLY
      NO SIGNALS
      NO DECISIONS
      NO ORDERS
      NO TRADES
      NO FILLS
      NO BROKER EXECUTION
      AUTOMATION OFF
    
                                
    
                                
      
      
    
                                
  
                                

                                



                                
  
                                
    
                                Review rationale
                                
    
                                
    
                                
      MANUAL REVIEW
      REVIEW RATIONALE ONLY
      NO SIGNALS
      NO DECISIONS
      NO ORDERS
      NO TRADES
      NO FILLS
      NO BROKER EXECUTION
      AUTOMATION OFF
    
                                
    
                                
      
                                Reason code
                                
      
    
                                
    
                                
      
                                Optional note
                                
      
    
                                
    
                                This updates manual review rationale only. No signals, decisions, orders, trades, fills, or broker actions are created. No trading actions are created by review notes.
                                
    
                                
      
      
    
                                
  
                                

                                


                                
  
                                
    
                                Confirm Action
